report_name: Open Source Under Siege: Axios, Trivy, and LiteLLM Hit by Supply Chain Attacks

threat_actors.name: Suspected North Korean state-sponsored actor
threat_actors.description: A suspected North Korean state-sponsored actor, as attributed by Google's Threat Intelligence Group, that compromised an npm maintainer's account to publish malicious versions of the Axios JavaScript library.
threat_actors.goals: Distribute credential-stealing malware through a popular open-source package.

threat_actors.name: TeamPCP
threat_actors.description: A cybercriminal group that targeted developers of the Trivy vulnerability scanner by deploying the SANDCLOCK credential stealer to harvest CI/CD secrets and conduct cascading supply chain attacks against other projects like KICS and LiteLLM.
threat_actors.goals: Steal CI/CD secrets and credentials to compromise software supply chains.

attack_patterns.name: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools
attack_patterns.description: Attackers compromised the Axios npm package and CI/CD environments related to Trivy, KICS, and LiteLLM to inject malicious code and steal secrets, representing a classic software supply chain attack.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: A suspected North Korean actor compromised the npm account of an Axios project maintainer to publish malicious versions of the library.

attack_patterns.name: Unsecured Credentials
attack_patterns.description: The SANDCLOCK malware was designed to extract sensitive data from developer environments, including CI/CD environment variables, cloud credentials (AWS, GCP), and Kubernetes configuration files.

attack_patterns.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
attack_patterns.description: The SANDCLOCK malware was transferred into developer environments to facilitate credential theft.

malware.name: SANDCLOCK
malware.description: A credential-stealing malware deployed by TeamPCP to extract sensitive data from developer environments, including CI/CD environment variables, cloud credentials, and Kubernetes configuration files.

tools.name: Axios
tools.description: A popular JavaScript library that was compromised via a maintainer's npm account. Malicious versions were published to distribute credential-stealing malware.

tools.name: Trivy
tools.description: An open-source vulnerability scanner whose developers and CI/CD environments were targeted by TeamPCP with the SANDCLOCK malware.

tools.name: KICS
tools.description: An open-source project that was compromised by TeamPCP as a cascading effect of the Trivy attack, using secrets stolen from Trivy's environment.

tools.name: LiteLLM
tools.description: An AI gateway project that was compromised by TeamPCP as a cascading effect of the Trivy attack, using secrets stolen from Trivy's environment.

campaigns.name: Axios Supply Chain Compromise
campaigns.description: A supply chain attack in March 2026 where a suspected North Korean actor compromised an Axios maintainer's npm account to publish malicious versions of the library, impacting downstream consumers like OpenAI.

campaigns.name: TeamPCP Trivy/SANDCLOCK Campaign
campaigns.description: A supply chain attack campaign in March-April 2026 where the cybercriminal group TeamPCP used SANDCLOCK malware to steal CI/CD secrets from Trivy developers, leading to the compromise of other projects like KICS and LiteLLM.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: A downstream consumer of the Axios library whose macOS app-signing workflow downloaded a malicious version, prompting the company to revoke and rotate certificates as a precaution.

indicators.name: SANDCLOCK Filename Detection
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: SANDCLOCK Malware File Creation
id: 7e8b1c2a-3d4e-4f5a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of a file named 'sandclock.py', associated with the SANDCLOCK credential stealer.
references:
  - https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/11/axios_trivy_supply_chain/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-10
tags:
  - attack.t1105
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\sandclock.py'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the presence of the SANDCLOCK malware file 'sandclock.py' on an endpoint.

indicators.name: CI/CD Environment Variable Dumping
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious CI/CD Environment Variable Dumping
id: 8f9a0b1c-2d3e-4f5a-8b9c-1d2e3f4a5b6c
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of 'env' or 'printenv' commands, which are often used by attackers in compromised CI/CD environments to dump all environment variables and secrets.
references:
  - https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/11/axios_trivy_supply_chain/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-10
tags:
  - attack.t1552
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - /env
      - /printenv
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects commands used to dump environment variables, a common technique for stealing secrets in compromised CI/CD pipelines.

indicators.name: Remote Script Execution via cURL to Shell
indicators.pattern:
title: Remote Script Execution via cURL to Shell
id: 9a0b1c2d-3e4f-5a8b-9c1d-2e3f4a5b6c7d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of 'curl' to download and immediately execute a script via a pipe to a shell, a common technique for ingress tool transfer.
references:
  - https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/11/axios_trivy_supply_chain/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-10
tags:
  - attack.t1105
  - attack.t1059.004
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: '/curl'
    Image|endswith:
      - /bash
      - /sh
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects a common pattern for downloading and executing remote scripts, as mentioned in the cyber observables section.

relationships.target_name: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools
Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools

relationships.source_name: Remote Script Execution via cURL to Shell
